title: Wandering Trader Command
description: A mod that adds a command to emulate the natural spawning of Wandering Traders. Use /spawntrader to give it a try!
body:
Ever wanted to summon a wandering trader just like the vanilla game, llamas and all?

..Probably not, let's be honest, but you can do it with this mod!


## __Commands__

/spawntrader

Will spawn a wandering trader within 48 blocks of a player. Currently this is the only functionality. 



This mod is inspired by a similar one made by slicedlime, for the purposes of demonstrating their wandering trader farm ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jzHKS2hQxLE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jzHKS2hQxLE)). If anyone is looking for a similar mod for Fabric 1.17, theirs can be found in the description of the linked video.

__Enjoy trading!__
